conclusions: The original 30-byte selector accepts only reqlevel 1, 6, 12, 18, 24 and 30.
The non-Paladin fallback computes class start + tier * 5 + random(0..4).
The existing Paladin path builds six pools by scanning the runtime class start and class skill count, so it can represent more than 30 skills and non-uniform tier sizes.
Forcing the existing dynamic path for every class removes the five-skills-per-tier assumption without replacing the staffmod bonus magnitude roll.

validation.coldStart: 20/20 patches applied; 1/1 plugin active; startup reached 24/24
validation.gameplayMatrix: not scheduled: the investigation was for a friend and the patch is intentionally excluded from the active BKVince mod
